Container.Name: Starr
Container.Overview: Web UI for diagnosing and repairing Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, and Sportarr SQLite databases. Safely shuts down the target app, creates a timestamped backup, runs SQLite PRAGMA repairs (integrity check, FK repair, WAL checkpoint, VACUUM, REINDEX, ANALYZE) on the idle database, then automatically waits for the app to come back online. All repair operations are streamed live to the browser terminal. Supports dry-run mode. Backups are auto-pruned after a configurable number of days. Protect the web UI with a SECRET_KEY to prevent unauthorised access on your network.

Volume.Description: Sonarr config directory (must contain sonarr.db). Leave blank if not using Sonarr.
Radarr config directory (must contain radarr.db). Leave blank if not using Radarr.
Lidarr config directory (must contain lidarr.db). Leave blank if not using Lidarr.
Sportarr config directory (must contain sportarr.db). Leave blank if not using Sportarr.
Where timestamped database backups are stored. Backups are auto-pruned based on MAX_BACKUP_AGE_DAYS.

Variable.Name: SECRET_KEY
Variable.Description: Web UI access key — set this to a strong random value to protect the dashboard. Anyone who can reach port 8877 can use the UI without this set.

Variable.Name: PORT
Variable.Description: Web UI listen port inside the container. Must match the port mapping above.

Variable.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Variable.Description: Log verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR

Variable.Name: MAX_BACKUP_AGE_DAYS
Variable.Description: Number of days to keep backups before auto-pruning. Set to 0 to disable pruning.

Variable.Name: SONARR_HOST
Variable.Description: Sonarr hostname or IP (e.g. sonarr or 192.168.1.10). Leave blank to configure in the web UI.

Variable.Name: SONARR_PORT
Variable.Description: Sonarr HTTP port.

Variable.Name: SONARR_APIKEY
Variable.Description: Sonarr API key — found at Settings › General › API Key.

Variable.Name: SONARR_URLBASE
Variable.Description: Sonarr URL base if you use a reverse proxy subpath, e.g. /sonarr. Leave blank if none.

Variable.Name: RADARR_HOST
Variable.Description: Radarr hostname or IP. Leave blank to configure in the web UI.

Variable.Name: RADARR_PORT
Variable.Description: Radarr HTTP port.

Variable.Name: RADARR_APIKEY
Variable.Description: Radarr API key — found at Settings › General › API Key.

Variable.Name: RADARR_URLBASE
Variable.Description: Radarr URL base if using a reverse proxy subpath, e.g. /radarr. Leave blank if none.

Variable.Name: LIDARR_HOST
Variable.Description: Lidarr hostname or IP. Leave blank to configure in the web UI.

Variable.Name: LIDARR_PORT
Variable.Description: Lidarr HTTP port.

Variable.Name: LIDARR_APIKEY
Variable.Description: Lidarr API key — found at Settings › General › API Key.

Variable.Name: LIDARR_URLBASE
Variable.Description: Lidarr URL base if using a reverse proxy subpath, e.g. /lidarr. Leave blank if none.

Variable.Name: SPORTARR_HOST
Variable.Description: Sportarr hostname or IP. Leave blank to configure in the web UI.

Variable.Name: SPORTARR_PORT
Variable.Description: Sportarr HTTP port (default: 1867).

Variable.Name: SPORTARR_APIKEY
Variable.Description: Sportarr API key — found at Settings › General › API Key.

Variable.Name: SPORTARR_URLBASE
Variable.Description: Sportarr URL base if using a reverse proxy subpath, e.g. /sportarr. Leave blank if none.
